User
Type to search specification sections

Project Specifications

Comprehensive specifications generated by AI to guide your development process. Review, edit, and approve each section to build a complete project blueprint.

Loading specification...

Error

Understanding your idea...
Please review the Overview specification below. You can edit it if needed (PRO users only), then approve to generate Technical and Market specifications.

Application Overview

Technical Specification

Mind Map

Market Research

Design & Branding

Design & Branding

Please approve the Overview and generate Technical & Market specifications first to create design guidelines.

Diagrams

Diagrams

Please approve the Overview and generate Technical & Market specifications first to create visual diagrams.

Development Prompts

Prompts

Please approve the Overview and generate Technical & Design specifications first to create development prompts.

Frontend Mockups

Create Frontend Mockups

Generate interactive HTML+CSS mockups based on your specifications

AI Chat Assistant

Ask questions about your specification

Welcome to AI Chat

Ask me anything about your specification. I have access to all the details and can help clarify, explain, or suggest improvements.

Brain Dump

Describe the feature or change you want. Get a detailed Context Explanation (sandbox-style walkthrough), a diagram of the affected subsystem, and a full prompt to implement it (5 per day).

Context Explanation

Full Development Prompt


                        

                        

                            
                        

                    

                    
                    

                         Generating...
                    

                

            

            
            

                

                    
 Export & Integration

                

                

                    
                    

                        
                        
                        
                    

                    
                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Select the sections you want to include in your exported HTML document.

                                

                                     
                                    Tip: After exporting, you can save the HTML file as PDF using your browser's "Print to PDF" feature (Ctrl+P / Cmd+P → Save as PDF).
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    
                                

                                
                                

                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                
                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    

                                

                                
Preparing export...

                            

                        

                    

                    
                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Generate Jira issues from your specification. The system will automatically create Epics, Stories, Tasks, and Sub-tasks based on your spec content.

                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                    The project key for your Jira project (e.g., PROJ, APP, DEV)
                                

                                
                                

                                    
                                    
                                

                                
                                

                                    
                                    
                                    Optional labels to add to all issues
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                
                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    

                                

                                
Preparing Jira export...

                            

                        

                    

                    
                    
                    

                        

                            

                                
Export your specification as a structured project package for Cursor integration and Windsurf integration AI editors.

                                

                                     
                                    Includes: Project plan, architecture docs, design guidelines, development roadmap, diagrams, and AI editor configuration files.
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                
Export Package Contents:

                                
    
                                    
  • PROJECT_PLAN.md - Project overview and market analysis
    • 
                                    
  • ARCHITECTURE.md - Technical specifications
    • 
                                    
  • DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md - UI/UX guidelines
    • 
                                    
  • DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP.md - Step-by-step development plan
    • 
                                    
  • DIAGRAMS.md - System diagrams
    • 
                                    
  • .cursorrules - Cursor AI editor configuration
    • 
                                    
  • .windsurf/info.md - Windsurf AI agent context
    • 
                                    
  • README.md - Quick start guide
    • 
                                    
  • metadata.json - Export information
    • 
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                
                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    

                                

                                
Preparing export...

                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    
                                    After extracting the ZIP file, Cursor and Windsurf will automatically detect the configuration files.
                                

                                
                                    Learn More About Cursor & Windsurf Integration

Tips

    

    
    
    

        

            
        

        
Why Specs

    

    
    
    

        

            
Common mistakes founders make before building

            
        

        

            
    
                
  • Starting development without clear requirements
    • 
                
  • Underestimating technical complexity and time
    • 
                
  • Building features users don't actually need
    • 
            

        

    

    
    

        

            
Why specs save tokens and time

            
        

        

            
    
                
  • Clear requirements reduce back-and-forth with AI
    • 
                
  • Detailed specs prevent costly mid-development changes
    • 
                
  • Well-documented plans speed up implementation
    • 
            

        

    







    

        

        

            
            
            
            
        

    

    







    

        

            
 Authentication Required

To save and manage your specifications, please sign in or create an account.

            

                
                    Sign In / Register
                
                
            

            

                As a guest, your specifications will only be saved locally and may be lost if you clear your browser data.
